channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: If you’d like to help us build the world’s largest and most powerful financial network, come work at...
item.description: If you’d like to help us build the world’s largest and most powerful financial network, come work at 𝕏 Money. We need talented engineers (backend, Android/Web) and operators - you will impact hundreds of millions of users as we expand globally. DM me!

item.title: @elonmusk: Democrats are weaponizing the Senate’s rules to block the SAVE America Act, defund@DHSgov, & hurt th...
item.description: Democrats are weaponizing the Senate’s rules to block the SAVE America Act, defund@DHSgov, & hurt the American people to spite@POTUS.@SenateGOPcan either let Dems keep obstructing & smash the filibuster the first chance they get, or we can act now & use the mandate the American people gave@realDonaldTrump& Republicans to secure our elections, protect our homeland, & bring back common sense. Democrats started this fight. I support whatever changes to Senate rules are necessary to finish it and pass the SAVE America Act.nypost.com/2026/03/11/opinio…

item.title: @elonmusk: being a *literal* springboard for a *literal* terrorist while verbatim saying "we welcome everyone i...
item.description: being a *literal* springboard for a *literal* terrorist while verbatim saying "we welcome everyone into this city" is poetic perfection

item.title: @elonmusk: Also I’m going to wait on sending out a dollar to the Round 2 accounts. I’m going to randomize the 1...
item.description: Also I’m going to wait on sending out a dollar to the Round 2 accounts. I’m going to randomize the 166 invitations for an Elon dollar giveaway. As you know Elon sent me more money; $69 to be exact. 👇🏻 So you will either get an Elon dollar or dollar.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 Beta just dropped in the X API with a 2,000,000 token context window. 2 million tokens. Th...
item.description: Grok 4.20 Beta just dropped in the X API with a 2,000,000 token context window. 2 million tokens. That's insane. Lowest hallucination rate on the market. Lightning fast. Function calling. Structured outputs. Reasoning. GPT 5.4 has 1M context. Claude Opus 4.6 has 200K. xAI just doubled the competition.

item.title: @elonmusk: If it’s allowed in an R-rated movie, it’s allowed in@GrokImagine

item.title: @elonmusk: Macrohard or Digital Optimus is a joint xAI-Tesla project, coming as part of Tesla’s investment agre...
item.description: Macrohard or Digital Optimus is a joint xAI-Tesla project, coming as part of Tesla’s investment agreement with xAI. Grok is the master conductor/navigator with deep understanding of the world to direct digital Optimus, which is processing and actioning the past 5 secs of real-time computer screen video and keyboard/mouse actions. Grok is like a much more advanced and sophisticated version of turn-by-turn navigation software. You can think of it as Digital Optimus AI being System 1 (instinctive part of the mind) and Grok being System 2. (thinking part of the mind). This will run very competitively on the super low cost Tesla AI4 ($650) paired with relatively frugal use of the much more expensive xAI Nvidia hardware. And it will be the only real-time smart AI system. This is a big deal. In principle, it is capable of emulating the function of entire companies. That is why the program is called MACROHARD, a funny reference to Microsoft. No other company can yet do this.
